/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-semantic-interposition -shared -Wl,-soname,libsqstdlib.so.0 -o ../lib/libsqstdlib.so.0.0.0 CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdaux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdblob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdmath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdrex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdstream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdstring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqstdlib.dir/sqstdsystem.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chase/Projects/squirrel/build-retained-source/lib: ../lib/libsquirrel.so.0.0.0
